calibration.method: Bayesian MCMC (CmdStanR + brms) and quantile regression
calibration.notes: Calibration based on FIA data. 6 of 7 component models integrated (tree: DG, H-D, HG, mortality, CR; stand: SDIMAX, BAMAX).

diameter_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_diameter.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_crown_base.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

mortality.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

crown_recession.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

provenance.baseline: calibrated population/pooled mean of each component fit

scale.dds_multiplier: DDS scale exp(delta b0); emitter applies sqrt for diameter-growth scale
scale.mort_multiplier: mortality rate ratio from survival logit incl species random effect

mortality.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: surv_crz.

metadata.default_policy: hybrid_per_species: leg_a where per-species fit reliable, else leg_b
